methods.name: AppIsAlreadyRunning
methods.description: Checks if another instance of this app is already running.

methods.name: Cancel
methods.description: Cancels a Notification based on numberID

methods.name: GetActiveNotifications
methods.description: Reteurns a list of all active notification IDs.

methods.name: MoveOtherAppToFront
methods.description: Moves an already running instance of the app to the front.

methods.name: RequestNotificationPermission
methods.description: Requests the permission to post notifications.

methods.name: SortSimpleList
methods.description: Sorts a simple list in ascending or descending.

blockProperties.name: AreNotificationsEnabled
blockProperties.description: Returns whether notifications are enabled for this app.

blockProperties.name: AreNotificationsPaused
blockProperties.description: Returns whether notifications are paused for this app.

blockProperties.name: BypassDnd
blockProperties.description: Notifications posted to this channel can interrupt the user in NotificationManager.INTERRUPTION_FILTER_PRIORITY mode

blockProperties.name: ChannelID
blockProperties.description: Sets the id of the channel. Must be unique per package. The value may be truncated if it is too long.

blockProperties.name: ChannelName
blockProperties.description: The the user visible name of this channel.

blockProperties.name: Description
blockProperties.description: The user visible description of this channel.

blockProperties.name: HasPostPermission
blockProperties.description: Returns wether the App can post notifications.

blockProperties.name: Importance
blockProperties.description: The level of interruption of this notification channel.

blockProperties.name: IsRunningInCompanion
blockProperties.description: Returns wether the app is running in the companion.

blockProperties.name: LightColor
blockProperties.description: Sets the notification light color for notifications posted to this channel, if lights are enabled on this channel and the device supports that feature.

blockProperties.name: LightEnabled
blockProperties.description: Sets whether notifications posted to this channel should display notification lights, on devices that support that feature.

blockProperties.name: LockscreenVisibility
blockProperties.description: Sets whether notifications posted to this channel appear on the lockscreen or not, and if so, whether they appear in a redacted form.

blockProperties.name: ShowBadge
blockProperties.description: Sets whether notifications posted to this channel can appear as application icon badges in a Launcher.

blockProperties.name: SoundEnabled
blockProperties.description: Sets whether notifications posted to this channel should play the default sound.

blockProperties.name: Version
blockProperties.description: Returns the component's version name.

blockProperties.name: VersionSDK
blockProperties.description: The SDK version of the software currently running on this hardware device.

blockProperties.name: VibrationEnabled
blockProperties.description: Sets whether notification posted to this channel should vibrate.

blockProperties.name: VibrationPattern
blockProperties.description: Sets the vibration pattern for notifications posted to this channel.

blockProperties.name: ActionType
blockProperties.description: Specifies the type of the Intent.

blockProperties.name: ActivityAction
blockProperties.description: Specifies the action to be executed.

blockProperties.name: ActivityClass
blockProperties.description: Specifies the class part of the specific component that will be started.

blockProperties.name: ActivityPackage
blockProperties.description: Specifies the package part of the specific component that will be started.

blockProperties.name: DataType
blockProperties.description: The explicit MIME data type.

blockProperties.name: DataUri
blockProperties.description: Specifies the data URI that will be used to start the activity.

blockProperties.name: Extras
blockProperties.description: The list of key-value pairs that will be passed as extra data to the activity.

blockProperties.name: FlagClearTask
blockProperties.description: Any existing task that would be associated with the activity is cleared before the activity is started.

blockProperties.name: FlagClearTop
blockProperties.description: If set, and the activity being launched is already running in the current task, then instead of launching a new instance of that activity, all of the other activities on top of it will be closed and this Intent will be delivered to the (now on top) old activity as a new Intent.

blockProperties.name: FlagExcludeFromRecents
blockProperties.description: The launched activity is not kept in the list of recently launched activities.

blockProperties.name: FlagNewTask
blockProperties.description: If set, this activity will become the start of a new task on this history stack.

blockProperties.name: FlagNoAnimation
blockProperties.description: This flag will prevent the system from applying an activity transition animation to go to the next activity state.

blockProperties.name: FlagNoHistory
blockProperties.description: The launched activity is not kept in the history stack.

blockProperties.name: FlagPreviousIsTop
blockProperties.description: If set and this intent is being used to launch a new activity from an existing one, the current activity will not be counted as the top activity for deciding whether the new intent should be delivered to the top instead of starting a new one.

blockProperties.name: FlagReorderToFront
blockProperties.description: This flag will cause the launched activity to be brought to the front of its task's history stack if it is already running.

blockProperties.name: FlagResetTaskIfNeeded
blockProperties.description: If this activity is either being started in a new task or bringing to the top an existing task, then it will be launched as the front door of the task.

blockProperties.name: FlagSingleTop
blockProperties.description: the activity will not be launched if it is already running at the top of the history stack.

blockProperties.name: FlagTaskOnHome
blockProperties.description: This flag will cause a newly launching task to be placed on top of the current home activity task.

blockProperties.name: ID
blockProperties.description: Specifies ID for Intents of Type 'Event'.

blockProperties.name: ScreenStartValue
blockProperties.description: Start value for AI2 apps.

blockProperties.name: ScreenToOpen
blockProperties.description: Screen to be openend.

methods.name: AddActionButton
methods.description: Adds action buttons to the notification.

methods.name: SetOnDestroyAction
methods.description: Defines the replacemant for the notification when the Screen is destroyed.

blockProperties.name: AreNotificationsEnabled
blockProperties.description: Returns whether notifications are enabled for this app.

blockProperties.name: AreNotificationsPaused
blockProperties.description: Returns whether notifications are paused for this app.

blockProperties.name: AutoCancel
blockProperties.description: The notification is automatically canceled when the user clicks it in the panel.

blockProperties.name: BigPicture
blockProperties.description: Provides the bitmap to be used as the payload for the BigPicture notification.

blockProperties.name: CancelOnDestroy
blockProperties.description: The notification is automatically canceled when the app is destroyed.

blockProperties.name: Color
blockProperties.description: Accent color to be applied to this notification.

blockProperties.name: Colorized
blockProperties.description: The color set with Color will be used as the background color of this notification.

blockProperties.name: IsInsistent
blockProperties.description: The audio will be repeated until the notification is cancelled or the notification window is opened.

blockProperties.name: IsOngoingEvent
blockProperties.description: This notification is in reference to something that is ongoing, like a phone call.

blockProperties.name: LargeIcon
blockProperties.description: Adds a large icon to the notification content view.

blockProperties.name: NoClear
blockProperties.description: The notification should not be canceled when the user clicks the Clear all button.

blockProperties.name: NumberID
blockProperties.description: An identifier for this notification unique within the application.

blockProperties.name: OnlyAlertOnce
blockProperties.description: Sound, vibration and ticker should only be played if the notification has not already been displayed.

blockProperties.name: SmallIconImage
blockProperties.description: The small icon representing this notification in the status bar and content view.

blockProperties.name: SmallSystemIcon
blockProperties.description: The small icon representing this notification in the status bar and content view.

blockProperties.name: Text
blockProperties.description: The second line of text.

blockProperties.name: Title
blockProperties.description: The first bold line of text.

blockProperties.name: VersionSDK
blockProperties.description: The SDK version of the software currently running on this hardware device.

blockProperties.name: When
blockProperties.description: Adds a timestamp pertaining to the notification.

blockProperties.name: WhenChronometerCountDown
blockProperties.description: Sets the Chronometer to count down instead of counting up.

blockProperties.name: WhenEnabled
blockProperties.description: Controls whether the timestamp set with setWhen is shown in the content view.

blockProperties.name: WhenUsesChronometer
blockProperties.description: Shows the Notification#when field as a stopwatch.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: The notification or an action button was clicked by the user.

events.name: OnNewIntent
events.description: The notification or an action button was clicked by the user.

events.name: UserCanceled
events.description: Notification was canceled by the user.
